title: Woodified
description: Adds different wooden tools for every wood type!
body:
![Woodified Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2eadc523fcce5da4a96141e4cb58015a0ee87bc.png)

### **Important!** This data pack will misbehave without the required resource pack, so please download that along with the data pack on the version page!

**Woodified** is a **Vanilla+** data (and resource) pack that adds different textures for all wooden tools, for each different wood type. That's it! I spent a lot of time on it though, and would love for you to play it!

Craft every tool just like you normally **wood** (get it?)! Woodified version **2.0** and up has proper **recipe unlocking!**
